title: Data Warehousing Architectural Framework
description: A layered diagram illustrating the key components and data flow in a standard data warehousing architecture.
relationships: Data Sources feed raw data into the ETL Layer
ETL Layer processes and cleanses data for Storage
Data Storage is the central repository for integrated data
Metadata provides context and definitions for the stored data
Data Marts are subsets of the warehouse for specific departments
Access Tools & Applications query the Data Storage and Marts for analysis and reporting
